parameters.query:
SELECT TOP 10
    dc.Client_PK,
    dc.Type_client,
    dc.Ville AS ville_client,
    DATEDIFF(DAY,
        MAX(CASE WHEN dd.Date != '1111-11-11' THEN dd.Date ELSE NULL END),
        '2026-01-02') AS recence_jours,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE
        WHEN fv.Numero_Facture != 'Aucun' THEN fv.Numero_Facture
        WHEN fv.Numero_Commande != 'Aucun' THEN fv.Numero_Commande
        ELSE NULL END) AS nb_commandes,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fv.Numero_Facture != 'Aucun' THEN fv.Numero_Facture ELSE NULL END) AS nb_factures_b2b,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN fv.Numero_Commande != 'Aucun' THEN fv.Numero_Commande ELSE NULL END) AS nb_commandes_b2c,
    AVG(fv.Montant_de_la_commande) AS panier_moyen,
    MAX(fv.Montant_de_la_commande) AS max_commande,
    MIN(fv.Montant_de_la_commande) AS min_commande,
    MAX(fv.Montant_de_la_commande) - MIN(fv.Montant_de_la_commande) AS variabilite_commandes,
    SUM(fv.Montant_de_la_commande) AS montant_total,
    AVG(fv.Montant_Remise) AS remise_moyenne,
    AVG(fv.Montant_Livraison) AS livraison_moyenne,
    SUM(fv.Quantite) AS total_quantite,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fv.Produit_FK) AS nb_produits_distincts,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fv.Categorie_FK) AS nb_categories,
    SUM(CASE WHEN dd.Mois IN (6,7,8,12) AND dd.Date != '1111-11-11'
        THEN fv.Montant_de_la_commande ELSE 0 END) AS ca_saison_haute,
    MAX(dmp.Type_paiement) AS paiement_dominant,
    MAX(dtv.Type_Vente) AS type_vente_dominant
FROM Fact_Ventes fv
JOIN Dim_Client dc ON fv.Client_FK = dc.Client_PK
JOIN DimDates dd ON fv.Date_FK = dd.Date_PK
JOIN Dim_Geographie dg ON fv.Geographie_FK = dg.Geographie_PK
JOIN Dim_Type_Vente dtv ON fv.Type_Vente_FK = dtv.Type_Vente_PK
JOIN Dim_Mode_Paiement dmp ON fv.Mode_Paiement_FK = dmp.Mode_Paiement_PK
WHERE dd.Date != '1111-11-11'
GROUP BY dc.Client_PK, dc.Type_client, dc.Ville;

SELECT TOP 10
    fv.Numero_Commande,
    MAX(fv.Montant_de_la_commande)                          AS Montant_de_la_commande,
    SUM(fv.Quantite)                                        AS Quantite_totale,
    AVG(fv.Prix_Unité)                                      AS Prix_Unité_moyen,
    SUM(fv.Montant_Remise)                                  AS Montant_Remise,
    SUM(fv.Montant_Livraison)                               AS Montant_Livraison,
    MAX(CASE WHEN fv.Code_Promo IS NOT NULL
        AND fv.Code_Promo != '' AND fv.Code_Promo != 'Aucun'
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                  AS a_code_promo,
    MAX(dc.Type_client)                                     AS Type_client,
    MAX(dc.Ville)                                           AS ville_client,
    MAX(dp.Prix)                                            AS prix_catalogue,
    CASE WHEN MAX(CAST(dp.En_Promo AS INT)) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS En_Promo,
    MAX(dp.Canal)                                           AS canal_produit,
    MAX(dcat.Categorie)                                     AS categorie,
    MAX(dtv.Type_Vente)                                     AS type_vente,
    MAX(dmp.Type_paiement)                                  AS type_paiement,
    MAX(dd.Annee)                                           AS Annee,
    MAX(dd.Mois)                                            AS Mois,
    MAX(dd.Trimestre) AS Trimestre,
    MAX(dd.Semestre)  AS Semestre,
    MAX(CASE WHEN dd.Mois IN (6,7,8,12) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS est_saison_haute
FROM Fact_Ventes fv
JOIN Dim_Client dc        ON fv.Client_FK       = dc.Client_PK
JOIN Dim_Produit dp       ON fv.Produit_FK      = dp.Produit_PK
JOIN Dim_Categorie dcat   ON fv.Categorie_FK    = dcat.Categorie_PK
JOIN Dim_Type_Vente dtv   ON fv.Type_Vente_FK   = dtv.Type_Vente_PK
JOIN Dim_Mode_Paiement dmp ON fv.Mode_Paiement_FK = dmp.Mode_Paiement_PK
JOIN DimDates dd          ON fv.Date_FK         = dd.Date_PK
WHERE fv.Montant_de_la_commande > 0
  AND dd.Date != '1111-11-11'
  AND fv.Numero_Facture = 'Aucun'
GROUP BY fv.Numero_Commande;

SELECT
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(7), dd.Date, 120) + '-01' AS Date,
    SUM(fv.Montant_de_la_commande) AS CA_Mensuel,
    SUM(fv.Quantite) AS Quantite_Mensuelle,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fv.Numero_Commande) AS Nb_Commandes,
    SUM(fv.Montant_Remise) AS Remise_Totale,
    AVG(fv.Prix_Unité) AS Prix_Moyen_Unite
FROM Fact_Ventes fv
JOIN DimDates dd ON fv.Date_FK = dd.Date_PK
WHERE dd.Date != '1111-11-11'
AND fv.Numero_Facture = 'Aucun'
AND fv.Montant_de_la_commande > 0
GROUP BY CONVERT(VARCHAR(7), dd.Date, 120)
ORDER BY Date

WITH ref AS (
    SELECT CAST(MAX(d.Date) AS DATE) AS today
    FROM dbo.Fact_Ventes v
    JOIN dbo.DimDates d ON v.Date_FK = d.Date_PK
),
rfm AS (
    SELECT
        v.Client_FK,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, MAX(d.Date), r.today)           AS Recency,
        COUNT(DISTINCT v.Numero_Commande)             AS Frequency,
        SUM(v.Montant_de_la_commande)                 AS Monetary,
        AVG(v.Montant_de_la_commande)                 AS Avg_Basket,
        SUM(v.Quantite)                               AS Total_Quantite,
        COUNT(DISTINCT v.Produit_FK)                  AS Nb_Produits,
        SUM(v.Montant_remise)                         AS Total_Remise,
        SUM(v.Montant_Remboursement)                  AS Total_Remboursement,
        COUNT(v.Vente_PK)                             AS Nb_Ventes,
        (
            SELECT TOP 1 v2.Type_Vente_FK
            FROM dbo.Fact_Ventes v2
            WHERE v2.Client_FK = v.Client_FK
            GROUP BY v2.Type_Vente_FK
            ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
        ) AS Mode_Vente_Principal,
        CASE WHEN c.Type_client = 'Entreprise' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Is_Entreprise
    FROM dbo.Fact_Ventes v
    JOIN dbo.DimDates d ON v.Date_FK = d.Date_PK
    JOIN dbo.Dim_Client c ON v.Client_FK = c.Client_PK
    CROSS JOIN ref r
    GROUP BY v.Client_FK, c.Type_client, r.today
)
SELECT TOP 10
    Client_FK,
    Recency,
    Frequency,
    Monetary,
    Avg_Basket,
    Total_Quantite,
    Nb_Produits,
    Total_Remise,
    Total_Remboursement,
    Nb_Ventes,
    Mode_Vente_Principal,
    Is_Entreprise,
    CASE
        WHEN Monetary = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE Total_Remise * 1.0 / Monetary
    END AS Taux_Remise
FROM rfm
ORDER BY Client_FK;

MERGE ML_Predictions_Classification AS target
USING (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        CAST({{ $json.client_id }} AS INT)        AS Client_ID,
        CAST({{ $json.prediction }} AS INT)       AS Prediction,
        CAST({{ $json.probabilite }} AS FLOAT)    AS Probabilite,
        CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)                   AS executed_at
) AS source (Client_ID, Prediction, Probabilite, executed_at)
ON target.Client_ID = source.Client_ID
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET
        Prediction   = source.Prediction,
        Probabilite  = source.Probabilite,
        executed_at = source.executed_at
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (Client_ID, Prediction, Probabilite, executed_at)
    VALUES (source.Client_ID, source.Prediction, source.Probabilite, source.executed_at);

MERGE dbo.ML_Predictions_Timeseries AS target
USING (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        CAST('{{ $json.date }}'        AS DATE)   AS date,
        CAST({{ $json.ca_predit }}     AS FLOAT)  AS ca_predit,
        CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)                   AS executed_at
) AS source (date, ca_predit, executed_at)
ON target.date = source.date
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET
        ca_predit    = source.ca_predit,
        executed_at = source.executed_at
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (date, ca_predit, executed_at)
    VALUES (source.date, source.ca_predit, source.executed_at);

MERGE dbo.Dim_Client_Segments AS target
USING (VALUES (
    {{ $json.Client_FK }},
    {{ $json.Cluster_ID }},
    '{{ $json.Segment_Label }}',
    CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
)) AS source (Client_FK, Cluster_ID, Segment_Label, Date_Scoring)
ON target.Client_FK = source.Client_FK
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET
        Cluster_ID    = source.Cluster_ID,
        Segment_Label = source.Segment_Label,
        Date_Scoring  = source.Date_Scoring
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (Client_FK, Cluster_ID, Segment_Label, Date_Scoring)
    VALUES (source.Client_FK, source.Cluster_ID, source.Segment_Label, source.Date_Scoring);

MERGE ML_Predictions_Regression AS target
USING (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        CAST('{{ $json.commande_id }}' AS NVARCHAR(50)) AS Commande_ID,
        CAST({{ $json.montant_predit }} AS FLOAT)       AS Montant_Predit,
        CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)                         AS executed_at
) AS source (Commande_ID, Montant_Predit, executed_at)
ON target.Commande_ID = source.Commande_ID
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET
        Montant_Predit = source.Montant_Predit,
        executed_at    = source.executed_at
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (Commande_ID, Montant_Predit, executed_at)
    VALUES (source.Commande_ID, source.Montant_Predit, source.executed_at);

parameters.subject: ML Pipeline FAILED
parameters.html:
=

ML Pipeline Error Report

Status: FAILED

Failed jobs:

    {{ $json.failedJobs.map(j => `
  • ${j.message || 'SQL error'} - rowsAffected: ${j.rowsAffected}
    • `).join('') }}
